title: HTR Ground Truth
description: Stroke-level ground truth annotations for HTR model evaluation. One file per source document, named <document-stem>.gt.json. The valid set of annotation classes is determined by schema_version.

schema_version.description: Version of this schema. Bump when adding new annotation classes or changing field semantics.

annotator_id.description: Identifier of the person who produced this annotation file.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this annotation file was created, e.g. 2024-07-26T14:32:00Z.

source_document.description: Reference to the source Xournal document being annotated.

filename.description: Filename of the source document, e.g. 2024-07-26_minimal.xopp.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the source document file. Guards against silent drift if the source file is modified after annotation.

annotations.description: Stroke-level annotations. Each entry assigns a class (and optionally text) to a group of strokes that form a single logical unit on the page.

class.description: Semantic class of this stroke group. Classes word, digit, and mathematical_expression require a text field.

text.description: Transcription of the stroke group. Required when class is word, digit, or mathematical_expression; absent otherwise.

page_index.description: Zero-based page index within the source document. All strokes in this annotation share the same page.

layer_index.description: Zero-based layer index within the page. All strokes in this annotation share the same layer.

stroke_indices.description: Zero-based indices of strokes within the layer that together form this annotation unit.
